mapper.insert: INSERT INTO follow_up_history_event ( register_id, department_id, event_type, actor_type, actor_id, title, summary, payload, ref_table, ref_id, occurred_at ) VALUES ( #{registerId}, #{departmentId}, #{eventType}, COALESCE(#{actorType}, 'system'), #{actorId}, #{title}, #{summary}, COALESCE(#{payloadJson}::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb), #{refTable}, #{refId}, COALESCE(#{occurredAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) )
mapper.select: SELECT e.id AS "id", e.payload AS "payload", e.summary AS "patientFeedback", e.occurred_at AS "followUpTime", e.payload->>'symptomRelief' AS "symptomRelief" FROM follow_up_history_event e WHERE e.register_id = #{registerId} AND e.event_type = 'patient_feedback' ORDER BY e.occurred_at DESC, e.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COALESCE( (SELECT fe.managing_department_id FROM follow_up_enrollment fe WHERE fe.register_id = #{registerId} AND fe.status = 'active' LIMIT 1), (SELECT fp.department_id FROM follow_up_patient_profile fp WHERE fp.register_id = #{registerId} LIMIT 1), (SELECT r.deptment_id FROM register r WHERE r.id = #{registerId} LIMIT 1) )
